title: PGL Astana 2026 CS2 Major Championship
description: PGL Astana 2026 is the first CS2 Major of the year held in Astana, Kazakhstan with a $1.25M prize pool. Majors are the most significant market catalyst: sticker capsule speculation drives prices 2 weeks before the event starts; high-tier items and knives see sustained demand uplift; StatTrak items receive additional interest from collectors tracking pro-player kills. Pre-Major speculation phase historically begins 10-14 days before the opening ceremony.

title: CS2 Patch 1.41.2 — Movement & Spray Pattern Update
description: Valve adjusted spray patterns for AK-47 and M4A4, and slightly modified AWP scoping behavior. Weapon meta changes can temporarily shift demand for affected weapon skins — if a weapon is perceived stronger, its skins see increased interest; nerfs can suppress demand short-term. This patch was relatively minor and community sentiment is mixed.

title: BLAST Premier Spring Final 2026
description: BLAST Premier Spring Final 2026 ran in Lisbon with $425K prize pool. Non-Major tournaments have moderate positive impact on market sentiment, particularly for high-tier and stattrak items. Post-event, market typically consolidates.

title: Kilowatt Case 3 Community Skins Collection Drop
description: Valve dropped a new community case featuring 17 new weapon finishes. New case releases drive case-opening activity, which increases overall market liquidity and creates short-term demand spikes for existing skins as new players enter the market. The case opening frenzy also generates streaming content that increases general skin awareness.

title: IEM Katowice 2026
description: IEM Katowice 2026, one of the most prestigious non-Major tournaments, ran in Katowice, Poland with $1M prize pool. The event drove sustained high-tier skin demand for 3 weeks. Post-event price action showed 4-8% average appreciation for covert/classified items.

title: Chinese New Year 2026 / Spring Festival
description: Chinese New Year causes a predictable 1-2 week domestic market slowdown on BUFF and 悠悠有品 as Chinese players are less active. Typically followed by a rebound in week 3 as gifting and gaming activity surges post-holiday. Net effect on 30-day pricing is roughly neutral, but short-term volatility increases.

title: CS2 Buy Round Economy Rebalance (v1.40.5)
description: Valve rebalanced the economy so buy rounds occur slightly less frequently in certain scenarios. This reduces overall match playtime with expensive weapons, slightly dampening the 'prestige' value of weapon skins in casual play. Market impact was modest but measurable: BUFF listing volumes dropped ~6% in the week following. Effect largely absorbed within 3 weeks.

title: BLAST Premier World Final 2025
description: BLAST Premier World Final 2025 in Abu Dhabi closed the 2025 competitive CS2 season. Year-end tournaments historically produce a final demand spike before the holiday period quiets the market.

title: Steam Winter Sale 2025
description: Steam Winter Sale 2025 drove a 22% increase in CS2 active players vs. prior month. New player influx consistently increases skin demand, particularly for entry-tier and mid-tier items. High-tier items also see increased interest as new players research the market. The Steam Wallet gifting trend adds buy pressure across all categories.

title: CS2 Operation: Riptide II
description: Valve launched a new operation with mission rewards and skin variants. Operations historically drive sustained market activity for 6-8 weeks, increasing general trading volume by 15-25% on domestic platforms. New operation skins create downward price pressure on similar-tier items but overall market activity lifts all boats.

title: Steam Black Friday / Cyber Monday 2025
description: Annual Steam sales event consistently drives new player acquisition and existing player spending. CS2 specifically benefits from friends-group gifting behavior. Historically, BUFF trading volume spikes 30-40% the week of Black Friday as traders anticipate new buyer demand.

title: CS2 Community Knife & Glove Showcase
description: Valve's in-client showcase featured knife and glove collections, exposing new players to the knife market. Showcase events for these categories historically drive 8-15% volume increase on BUFF and 悠悠有品 in the following 2 weeks as awareness converts to purchase intent.

title: IEM Dallas 2026
description: IEM Dallas 2026 is the next major non-Major tournament following PGL Astana. With $500K prize pool, the event will sustain market momentum post-Major. Pre-event speculation is expected to begin approximately May 5.

title: BUFF163 Transaction Fee Adjustment
description: BUFF163 adjusted its seller commission structure slightly upward, increasing effective transaction costs for sellers. This creates mild downward price pressure as sellers price more aggressively to maintain take-home value. The effect is most pronounced on lower-priced items where the commission is a higher % of proceeds.

title: China Golden Week / Labor Day Holiday 2026
description: China's Golden Week (May Day holiday, May 1-5) consistently drives increased BUFF and 悠悠有品 trading volumes as domestic players have extended gaming time. Historically, CN platform prices see a 5-10% lift during this period, coinciding with PGL Astana 2026 Major (April 28 - May 11), amplifying the effect.

title: StatTrak™ Swap Tool Re-promotion
description: Renewed community focus on the StatTrak Swap Tool following content creator coverage drove increased StatTrak item demand. StatTrak variants historically carry a 3-5x price premium over non-ST equivalents; increased awareness of the swap tool can narrow this gap or sustain demand.

title: ESL Pro League Season 22
description: ESL Pro League Season 22 ran March 5-30, 2026 with $835K prize pool across 6 regional groups. League play events produce moderate and sustained market engagement over their multi-week run, particularly in the final week. Rifle and AWP skins of the competing teams' preferred weapons see slight demand upticks.

title: AWP Meta Resurgence — Pro Scene Trend
description: Multiple top-10 HLTV teams shifted to double-AWP strategies in early 2026, driving increased viewership attention on AWP usage. This 'meta signal' correlates with 10-20% volume increases for AWP skins on BUFF within 30 days, as viewers aspire to emulate professional loadouts.

title: CS2 VAC Live Anti-Cheat Expansion v2
description: Valve expanded VAC Live coverage, significantly reducing cheating in matchmaking. Improved game integrity drives player retention and new player acquisition, which is a long-term positive for skin market volume. Community reception was very positive, with concurrent player counts rising ~8% in the month following.

title: CS2 Third Anniversary Capsule Drop
description: CS2's third anniversary event included special commemorative capsules and community challenges. Anniversary events tend to re-engage lapsed players and stimulate high-tier skin interest as retrospective content highlights rare items. Knife and glove categories historically outperform during anniversary periods.

title: PGL CS2 Major Championship Cluj-Napoca 2025
description: PGL CS2 Major Cluj-Napoca 2025 with $1.25M prize pool. Market data from this event: average covert skin prices rose 12% in the 2 weeks pre-event, knife categories averaged +18% pre-event. Sticker capsules from this event have since settled 35% below peak. High-tier items showed sustained demand uplift for 4 weeks post-event.

title: CS2 Item Drop System Update — Reduced Weekly Drop Frequency
description: Valve slightly reduced weekly item drop frequency, which has a mild positive long-term effect on existing skin prices by reducing supply growth. Effect is modest (~2-3% price support) and manifests over months rather than days.
